locale.description: Locale used for SDD templates and skills.

extra_skills.description: Additional optional SDD skills to enable (extend candidates). On init --update / update-skills, candidates = default workflow skills + this list; then `.agents/skills/llman-sdd-*` not in candidates are removed before rewrite. Valid values: llman-sdd-new-change, llman-sdd-continue, llman-sdd-ff, llman-sdd-sync, llman-sdd-validate.

archive.description: Archive behaviour settings (defer tracking, completion gates).

strict_defer.description: When true, unchecked tasks without a defer link are errors (not just warnings). Default: false (transition period).

min_completion_ratio.description: Minimum task completion ratio (0.0–1.0) required for archiving. Default: none (disabled).

bdd.description: BDD integration settings. When defined, enables feature-as-spec mode (directory-based .feature validation) and BDD-aware verify prompts.

framework.description: BDD framework identifier (optional). Only used to derive a default run_command when run_command is unset.

feature_dir.description: Root directory for .feature files, relative to project root.

run_command.description: Custom test run command. Placeholders: {feature_dir}, {feature_name}, {feature_path}. Without placeholders, validate --all/--specs runs the command at most once per batch (batch-once).

verify_prompt.description: Extra prompt text injected during verify phase.
